items.q: Are your healthcare assistants trained and CQC compliant?
items.a: Yes. All our HCAs receive mandatory training in care standards, safeguarding, infection control, and manual handling and adhere to CQC staffing requirements

items.q: Can I hire healthcare assistants on a temporary basis?
items.a: Absolutely. We provide flexible HCA for hire solutions—short-term, long-term, or ad-hoc placements.

items.q: Do you offer same-day staffing for urgent shifts?
items.a: Yes. Depending on availability, we can supply same-day or next-day cover

items.q: Do you supply HCAs to supported living environments?
items.a: Yes. Our healthcare assistants are trained to support adults with a wide range of care needs in supported living settings.

fields.body: Request A Call Back Need Professional HCAs? Our rigorous selection process ensures every Healthcare Assistant UK we supply: ✅ Holds NVQ Level 2/3 in Health & Social Care (or equivalent) ✅ Undergoes enhanced DBS checks and reference verification ✅ Completes mandatory training in: Safeguarding vulnerable adults Infection prevention & control Manual handling techniques Medication administration Need a H.

Trained in personal care, moving and handling, and infection control Fully DBS-checked and compliance-ready Available for emergency, temporary, or long-term placements Experience with elderly care, dementia, physical disability, and palliative care Compassionate, professional, and adaptable in all care settings We specialise in Healthcare Assistants UK staffing that meets the demands of busy care providers while ensuring residents receive consistent and quality care. FREE Quote Our Healthcare Assistants UK Services Personal Care Support: Assisting with washing, dressing, toileting, and mobility Meal preparation and nutritional support Maintaining dignity and independence Health-Related Tasks: Monitoring wellbeing and reporting concerns Supporting with medication (under supervision) Liaising with nursing and clinical teams Emotional & Companionship Care: Providing conversation, reassurance, and social engagement Supporting service users with memory loss, loneliness, or anxiety Promoting confidence and wellbeing through encouragement and empathy Who we Work With Residential and Nursing Homes Supported Living Services Mental Health Units Learning Disability Services Local Authorities and Private Providers Need urgent HCA cover Call Now: 020 3973 8887 (FAQs) Frequently Asked Question (FAQs) Are your healthcare assistants trained and CQC compliant?
How do I request healthcare assistants? Simply fill out our request form, call us on 020 3973 8887, or email us on staffing@vigilservices.
uk and we’ll match you with the best candidates.
